SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement (this "Agreement") is entered into on 24 May 2026 by and between:
(1) Acme Pte. Ltd. (UEN 200512345A), a company incorporated under the laws of Singapore (the "Vendor"); and
(2) Globex Holdings Pte. Ltd. (UEN T08LL1234A) (the "Purchaser").

The Vendor agrees to sell, and the Purchaser agrees to acquire, 100% of the shares in Beta Industries Pte. Ltd.
for a total consideration of $2.5 billion, before public announcement.

Authorised signatories:
  For the Vendor: Dr Jane Tan, NRIC S1234567D.
  For the Purchaser: Mr John Lim, NRIC S7654321Z.

Contact: jane@acme.sg, +65 6123 4567.
